node.text:
Swipe through the layers of the new Supernova Rise 3, designed to give you dreamlike cushion and support in every step. 

#adidasSupernova

node.text:
No actors. No scripts. Just a regular day at the office.
 
Meet the real people behind the #Adizero Adios Pro 4.

70% of runners say the best part of the run is the end. But maybe they haven’t met real comfort yet. 
 
What’s your take? 👇 

#adidasSupernova

Adizero Boston 13 and Adios Pro 4: our fastest couple. 

Taking you to the starting line – and picking you up at the finish. 

#Adizero

#adidasSupernova

node.text: Introducing The 2026 Boston Marathon® Collection and embroidered Celebration Jacket—a tradition stitched in history. Available December 4, exclusively online in the U.S.A. #YouGotThis #BostonMarathon #Boston130

Introducing the next generation of comfort with the Supernova Rise 3 and Supernova Glide.​

​⭐ Rise 3: Made for performance comfort, with a new Primeweave upper and Dreamstrike+ midsole that’s softer, smoother and more responsive than ever.​

⭐ Glide: Your go-to for easy miles, with a Dreamstrike Glow midsole that’s soft from step-in to cooldown.​

Available on December 4th​.

#adidasSupernova

node.text:
Evo SL ATR: new terrain unlocked 🔒

Launching December 3rd.

#Adizero Evo SL ATR

Speed doesn’t stop when the forecast changes ☁️💨​

Meet the Adizero Evo SL ATR - engineered to help stay fast through wet conditions 🌧️​

➕ Woven ripstop mesh upper: to provide water repellency for when conditions are at their worst. 

➕ Lightstrike Pro midsole: a full-length, high-stack Lightstrike Pro midsole without stiffening elements, providing a smooth and dynamic feel. 

➕ Lugged outsole: the Continental™️ rubber outsole features 1.5mm lugs, offering superior traction and durability across a range of surfaces.

Launching December 3rd.

#Adizero

One distance, zero doubt. @emmanuelwanyonyi800m is @worldathletics’ Track Athlete of the Year 🔥 

#YouGotThis

Greatness comes step by step. It’s another win on the journey for @sabastiansawe – @worldathletics Out of Stadium Athlete of the Year 👏

#YouGotThis

Strength isn’t always loud. Sometimes it’s just knowing who you are. 

@annaa.hall is comfortable in her own power.
Energy doesn’t lie. And @nojo18 energy is unmatched.

Possibly the fastest long-distance running​ shoe. Possibly yours?​

​Presenting our latest innovation: the Adizero Prime X Evo. The footwear debuted by @kubheka_sbusiso as he triumphantly broke the six-hour 100km barrier at adidas’ Chasing 100 event earlier this year. ​

For your chance to buy, sign-ups open via link in bio.​

These aren’t for everyone – the shoe is designed with the singular goal of running 100km in under six hours*, and its ultra-lightweight construction reflects this ambition.​

Arriving in limited quantities from today in Europe via adidas.com, the adidas app and selected retailers. Further drops around the world coming soon.​

*Note that the stack height sits outside of World Athletics regulations and is recommended for road surfaces only​.

The evolution of fast.​
​
Agravic Speed Ultra 2.​
​
You saw it race UTMB, now see the real thing take on UTCT.​
​
Available from December 2 for a limited time.​
​
#adidasTERREX

node.text:
In the shadow of Table Mountain, the future takes centre stage.​

Built for those who chase every second, every summit, every stride.​

​Agravic Speed Ultra 2, born from athlete insight, made for your fastest trail run yet.​

Exclusive early access for adiClub members available from 2 December.
​
#adidasTERREX​

This is what it means to Feel Fast. ​The detailed glow of runners in the Dominican Republic.​ Designed to inspire motion and fuel passion.​

Introducing the Adizero Evo SL Reflective Pack. Creative and visual direction by @renellmedrano and @pharrell.

node.text:
To follow a light – a portal of memory. A unified magnetic collective becomes the light.​
​
Introducing the Adizero FW25 Evo SL Reflective Pack. Creative and visual direction by @renellmedrano and @pharrell.

The proof Is in the podium 👟 

The city that never sleeps just woke up to a reminder that Adizero doesn’t rest either. Four athletes, three stripes, one sweep, all driven by the same innovation built for moments like this.

New York didn’t just see a race, it saw a statement.

#Adizero #YouGotThis

Dominance down to the wire🗽

Glory shared stride for stride in New York with @bensonkipruto24 claiming his fourth world marathon major and @alexmutiso57 right behind.

📸 @nyrr  
#TCSNYCMarathon
